title: CSE professor launches University of Minnesota’s 301st spin-off
summary_en: College of Science and Engineering Professor Jian Ping-Wang's new startup—the University’s 301st since 2006—seeks to address the energy crisis caused by the recent booming of AI applications.
title_cn: 科学与工程学院教授创办明尼苏达大学第301家衍生企业
